Watch Private Markets in 2030: A fireside chat with Mark O'Hare and Wei Li on demand

This webinar featured a fireside chat between Wei Li, Global Chief Investment Strategist, BlackRock, and Mark O’Hare, Vice Chairman at BlackRock and founder and former CEO of Preqin, along with a presentation by Paul Sinthunont, CFA, VP, Research Insights, on key findings from the Private Markets in 2030 report and what the industry can expect to see over the next five-year period.

The Private Markets in 2030 report is brought to life by Preqin’s team of experienced professionals who combine their expertise with our proprietary data to deliver unmatched analysis of private markets. Browse through to see other reports written by these expert analysts, or request a demo today to learn more about how the insights behind this research could support your private markets activities.
